'''Fruck''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] boar. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was one of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ugmush]]'s husbands and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] onboard her ship, the ''[[Zicreex]]''.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
